blocks.text: Welcome to D.I.G.E. (Dijiang Integrated Generator Efficiency)! This is a tool for calculating optimal power generation solutions for the Thermal Pool in Arknights: Endfield.
Development update: we are continuing to refine core algorithms and optimize plans. Related updates will be released gradually.

items: Automatically calculate optimal generation based on target power
Support for primary and secondary fuel combinations
Visualize power curves and battery levels
Display detailed splitter and storage configurations
Set target power in the left control panel
Select primary fuel (required) and secondary fuel (optional)
Adjust minimum battery level and max waste limits
Click "Calculate" to get optimal solutions
View solution details and diagrams on the right

segments.text: if you have any questions or suggestions.

sections.title: v1.9.0 Updates
items: Added blueprint export with single-branch download and all-branches ZIP download.
Improved modal interactions: important warnings now require explicit button confirmation to close.
Added complete export image preview and a minimum battery threshold line in cycle charts.
Added "Branch Phase Offset (cells)" with independent 0-16 cell settings per branch to simulate different starting conveyor lengths.

sections.title: v1.8.0 Updates
items: Added Blueprint mode for blueprint-style plan viewing.
Added Max Branches setting to control plan complexity.
Blueprint mode now uses icons for conveyors, splitters, mergers, etc., for a clearer view.
Input source, thermal output, and recycle output no longer show direction arrows.
Improved blueprint legend layout and interaction.
Blueprint mode supports zooming in for a closer look; scroll the mouse wheel or pinch with two fingers to zoom, then drag to view different areas.
Added "Exclude conveyors" option (default on) to mitigate offline flow issues.
Added FAQ (Q&A) page, accessible from the top or left menu.
On smaller screens, some top icons are grouped into a "More" menu for a cleaner look.
Fixed buttons being squeezed or distorted at the bottom of some popups.

sections.title: v1.7.0 Updates
items: Upgraded icon library for more consistent display
Improved spacing for mixed CJK and Latin text
Simplified language menu to show native names only
Wider sidebar for better display of longer languages
Scroll hint at sidebar bottom to help locate the Calculate button
Smart reminder when parameters are changed but not recalculated, with options to calculate, restore, or dismiss
Various button interaction and animation improvements
Added QQ group join feature (Chinese only)

sections.title: v1.6.0 Updates
items: Added Russian, French and German language support
Language selector shows native and translated names
Fixed fuel/battery/facility names to match official in-game terminology
Fixed display issue when switching solutions

sections.title: v1.5.0 Updates
items: Added input source selection: Warehouse / Packaging Machine (10s/item)
Packer mode now shows an input warning

sections.title: v1.4.0 Updates
items: Improved cycle chart accuracy to better align with burn cycles
Large datasets are automatically simplified; toggle "Precise Values" for full detail
Hover info now shows time

sections.title: v1.3.0 Updates
items: Added a time axis to the chart
Chart supports wheel zoom, drag, pinch zoom, and mobile pan
Added per-branch battery burn-state lines
Cycle chart, fuel consumption, and diagram sections are collapsible
